ground_truth.title: Top 1% Blockchain Developers for Hire – Lemon.io
ground_truth.main_content:

Why hire Blockchain developers through Lemon.io? Finding good Blockchain developers for hire is time-consuming and distracting for your team. Simplify and speed up your recruitment with Lemon.io, so your team can focus on their projects. Benefits include: Better talent - our pool of 1300+ vetted senior developers; Faster turnaround - results within 48 hours; Guaranteed satisfaction with free replacement.

How to hire Blockchain developer through Lemon.io: Step 1 - Place a free request by filling out a short form and checking out ready-to-interview developers; Step 2 - Tell us about your needs on a 30-min call, sharing expectations and getting a budget estimate; Step 3 - Interview the best candidates, getting 2-3 expertly matched candidates within 24-48 hours; Step 4 - Onboard the chosen one with Lemon.io handling contracts, monthly payouts, and more.

What we do for you: Sourcing and vetting - all developers are fully vetted and tested for both soft and hard skills; Expert matching - hand-picked candidates specifically for your request; Arranging cooperation - Lemon.io handles agreements, reporting, and payments; Support and troubleshooting - customer success manager and 100% free replacement guarantee.

FAQ about hiring Blockchain developers: Average cost to hire a Blockchain developer in the US is around $146,250 per year or $70.31 per hour; Cost of implementing Blockchain software ranges from $50,000 to $2,000,000; Private blockchain costs about $1500 a month; Blockchain developers are in high demand in 2024 with companies like IBM, Microsoft, and JP Morgan Chase using the technology.

Lemon.io provides up to 20 prepaid risk-free hours with blockchain developers, or a zero-risk replacement guarantee. Hire a Blockchain developer through Lemon.io in 48 hours after their vetting process including VideoAsk, profile completion, screening calls, and technical interviews.
